description.ko: 심해 가장 깊은 곳의 생체 발광 생명체와 첨단 연구 포드를 묘사한 수중 장면입니다.
description.en: An underwater scene depicting bioluminescent life and high-tech research pods in the deepest part of the ocean.

prompt: A cinematic ultra-detailed shot of AQUA-5, titled 'The Hydrothermal Sanctuary.' A cluster of organic research pods in the #000080 midnight zone. Massive #40E0D0 turquoise jellyfish with #48D1CC cyan tendrils drift by, pulsing with light. The #006994 water is thick with marine snow and micro-bubbles. High-tech floodlights illuminate jagged mineral vents on the ocean floor. 8k resolution, photorealistic fluid dynamics, capturing the peaceful and mysterious dance of life in the high-pressure deep.
